title: Dynamic Trees - Ecologics
description: Compatibility Mod between Dynamic trees and Ecologics
body: ![Banner](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/918/258/ecologics.png) [![Discord](https://i.imgur.com/0Prkr13.png)](https://discord.gg/A4FCBS3) [![Forge](https://i.imgur.com/oeSBh9T.png)](https://files.minecraftforge.net) ## Overview This mod makes Ecologics compatible with Dynamic Trees, adding dynamically growing versions of trees added by it, and fully replacing them during world generation. The trees, their behavior and their generation can be customized and tweaked through the use of Tree Packs. ## Features ### New Trees - Coconut Palm - Walnut Tree ### New Cacti _(requires [DT+](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus))_ - Prickly Pear Cactus ### Ecologic's Azalea With this addon, azalea trees will have Ecologic's azalea logs, and will also drop more logs to make them more viable. ### World Gen - Coconut palms can be found rarely on beaches - Azalea trees that generate will have Ecologic's branches and log drops - If [Dynamic Trees +](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictreesplus) is installed, Prickly Pear cacti will generate on deserts ## Other addons Addons for other mods can be found in the [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) page. ### Suggestions and Requests To request a new mod for compatibility please do it [Github Discussions](https://github.com/orgs/DynamicTreesTeam/discussions/categories/compatibility-addon-suggestions). ## Requirements - [Dynamic Trees](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) - [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics) - Optionally, [Dynamic Trees Plus](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamictrees) which includes dynamic Prickly Pear Cactus ## License, Permission and Modpacks Permission is hereby granted to use this mod in ANY mod pack or server. Please don't ask for permission to You can use this in any mod pack you'd like! No need to ask. This mod has an MIT license and its source is public on github.
